nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: A piercing headache wakes her up.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: As she slowly open her eyes. The pain rings like a bell.
Choice 1: Get out of bed?

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: As she gets out of bed... Her head hurts a bit from the headache as she stumble towards her dresser.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: She's still tired, yet her body needs to get out. She annoyingly drags herself to her dresser.

nodes.speaker: ??? (Thoughts)
nodes.text: As I look at the groggy reflection on my dresser’s mirror, I can't shake the feeling that something is trapping me again... ……

nodes.speaker: Elsa
nodes.text: My name is Elsa Maria. I live alone. My parents have abandoned me. My sister is missing and I can only cling to God’s merciless gaze

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: She noticed the Clock strikes at 9 AM

nodes.speaker: Elsa
nodes.text: My Psychiatrist appointment is scheduled for today. I should better get going.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Elsa Maria goes to her psychiatrist appointment, checking up her usual routine

nodes.speaker: Psychiatrist
nodes.text: Good morning, Elsa Maria, here is your monthly prescription.

nodes.speaker: Elsa (Calm)
nodes.text: Good morning, miss, thank you.

nodes.speaker: Psychiatrist
nodes.text: Are you feeling well? Any strange dreams again?

nodes.speaker: Elsa (Calm)
nodes.text: I am… alright. No dreams last night, just cold and empty.

nodes.speaker: Psychiatrist
nodes.text: I suppose that's good. Usually your dreams would incite violent reactions towards yourself. What about your recent thoughts? Have they been disturbing you?

nodes.speaker: Elsa (Neutral)
nodes.text: I’m… not sure. I don’t want to think about anything

nodes.speaker: Psychiatrist
nodes.text: Well, I am here to help. In the end change will still lie with you. I know that your past has traumatized you, but we can work together to improve.

nodes.speaker: Elsa (Calm)
nodes.text: … … Thank you. I will take my leave now.

nodes.speaker: Psychiatrist
nodes.text: Be safe, my dear.

nodes.speaker: Elsa (Thoughts)
nodes.text: I still have this heavy feeling in my head, and in my chest... The Psychiatrist just prescribed me medication... Maybe Father will be able to help me more.
